name: Team Weld
subject: coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRd8dqoceIuBXTfuJiYTpvBQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=1)
Team — We are in the midst of a world-wide pandemic and our government is in no way prepared to handle a disaster of this scale. Don’t believe us? Just read this ⤵️
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRd8dqoceIuBXTfuJiYTpvBQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=2)
Part of being president is preparing our government to protect Americans from a wide variety of threats, including biological. And the reality is, President Trump has done everything in his power to dismantle our disaster response capabilities, including firing the** _government’s pandemic response chain of command._**
This is another example of why it is so important to elect a president who puts the interest of our nation ahead of his own personal and political interests. This is why it is so important to elect a president who understands the limited role the government can play in protecting its citizens from harm. **This is why we need to blow folks away on Super Tuesday and continue our march onto the nomination.**
[**Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us make that happen?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRd8dqoceIuBXTfuJiYTpvBQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=3)
| [CHIP IN →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRd8dqoceIuBXTfuJiYTpvBQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=4)
---
Thanks,
Team Weld
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=6) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200225_frs&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Your first contribution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend, I'm reaching out to ask you to make your first contribution to my re-election campaign. [**You can pitch in right here >>**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")

I hope you'll give me the chance to explain why any donation you add right now is so important.

In a few short days, we will face our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and right now, we're behind where we need to be to reach our goal. That matters.

Our very first FEC deadline of the year is coming up and hitting our target now will decide whether or not we are on pace to report the strongest numbers possible at the end of this quarter.

We simply cannot afford to come up short at this specific deadline because the money we raise right now will help us grow our campaign in a big way -- by hiring critical staff, opening offices in every corner of Minnesota, and spreading our message to voters with targeted ads.

That's why your contribution matters so much today.

**Can I count on you to donate to our campaign ahead of this crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't absolutely important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200225-nd?refcode=em200225-nd&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")

I can't thank you enough.

-- Tina

body:
The most important thing is giving each and every Hoosier who wants to help us compete in 2020 a chance to put some skin in the game and be a part of [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b92e9ebdac2744ca8a0bcd221d6312f9&_e=96LJYfMZuSIHJG0Xw1L6H61Hi0My2lZxvAioe8HHUIzfg341Qitc0Ycy-vgEzXgzvMBCbwhY0vKUQfUaFZp4PW9phBcYyyOjsTokijJjD7JnUJHf2y60-z8tdXDHrOECnk3vGNv8srDOsz07q-GWG8nHXx5sJoW1CXvJyNcs9ISzS4pZjz-fkDCP2tPvprg4_i4sUpiJL7i2OnEKjEc9c-MfGXTvLZSC3a_ZfVuD5jvIHGu5ZOzDwLNn_KAq5nrZ3x3ZOKA2N664UnYZFtM9zpDvtdNkBz7M92AuwXJpyHiXgD4OWwcUPYuCkLXDoKPSP-1fnBl8fZdSyT1gr6S3lEzX2VFuMLZnd6S4l0dVV8IThZBJ9WDOuHj8LykltmvAs_KsC9FQuuHXvOE4Okv7u4Ym3N385ZvFg51SJz87vQQ%3D) Friend,

Our end of month fundraising deadlines are important — you most likely already know this, you hear it from us month in and month out.
**But our bottom line isn’t the most important thing about our monthly fundraising campaigns. **
The most important thing is giving each and every Hoosier who wants to help us compete in 2020 a chance to put some skin in the game and be a part of our movement.
[**That’s why we’re only asking for $3.75 this month (the price of a Chick-fil-A sandwich).**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b92e9ebdac2744ca8a0bcd221d6312f9&_e=96LJYfMZuSIHJG0Xw1L6H61Hi0My2lZxvAioe8HHUIzfg341Qitc0Ycy-vgEzXgzz0RFxTOSlF_GxgOXV25wAyBvYNVePK1WgmKgjqua_KspTGhS89zBr7nYw9G18-nGxxN3DPjGAum9MTeSRlft21etFJkx47k7cJdn3G3xtbn6IQaGrub8EvY3l7NX43M7FDHvIA1SGF7nWAPjLQTtY5J0TXWxbWOuZDYtH7UEzQx4D3XYC5LohL0dd6yeekkZsyizN5UmidErU1l4yAREwzACEQqeVGmV-LaADMLEWGUm2XiRep0wBwhMAhQXcGUD9wt1LQsdcwdxqw4TtuwVGze7vpwhtOnf8Xrbzd7k1uxSYmMLNs3CK98xQ8DmlP6YxYxxGAefvYxeo1RqTD2b5BPokzr-pSdu2b23-PNr3IE%3D) [ **Chip in $3.75** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b92e9ebdac2744ca8a0bcd221d6312f9&_e=96LJYfMZuSIHJG0Xw1L6H61Hi0My2lZxvAioe8HHUIzfg341Qitc0Ycy-vgEzXgzz0RFxTOSlF_GxgOXV25wAyBvYNVePK1WgmKgjqua_KspTGhS89zBr7nYw9G18-nGxxN3DPjGAum9MTeSRlft21etFJkx47k7cJdn3G3xtbn6IQaGrub8EvY3l7NX43M7FDHvIA1SGF7nWAPjLQTtY38KgHWqJ1JNMm_Lh9FBkjPlc5JNuEh4o1nXr-WPIlbnwcJJL5pEMCDq4cvrYmAXhR9n3T4N5kjBR9ZLHTLSIJcKq82jZzuFFlTVAUPig9New9T7seyktSpjELqnIKlU7zwU5p44SnhmHJrlL-L2w01dNEU96nIDsUDO61WNmmpqlHgG0rQVP_HkBJnTRYOG1h6sROUxyd43aYyoi8irtGI%3D) We’re determined to keep building on the conservative policies that are keeping American safe, rebuilding the working class through a Blue Collar Boom, and making lives better for Americans across our great country.
We want every single one of our supporters to be all in for 2020 —**[if you want to show Greg you have his back, chip in just $3.75 to help him win and keep fighting for the conservative causes that matter most.](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b92e9ebdac2744ca8a0bcd221d6312f9&_e=96LJYfMZuSIHJG0Xw1L6H61Hi0My2lZxvAioe8HHUIzfg341Qitc0Ycy-vgEzXgzz0RFxTOSlF_GxgOXV25wAyBvYNVePK1WgmKgjqua_KspTGhS89zBr7nYw9G18-nGxxN3DPjGAum9MTeSRlft21etFJkx47k7cJdn3G3xtbn6IQaGrub8EvY3l7NX43M7FDHvIA1SGF7nWAPjLQTtY2XzXWtZngbyHITIeBMd32ihQIFoNhC5saIF79hJdUtF_rRDqk3y6uhvpdzKF4hNbcynacr-221nSm2o2M-bL11otPbIOHn2rSkZm78iBGG8rtzEmnSdMK2B3m4VgqoIzXoTsEq-H_IR5WrjrPtxkGoIV1eqMWoJxa1u6QsO2OWHuFEYTVHXZf-MWnYHM6l5MjziyCd1ECgQ7zXWb_tP7vg%3D)** [ **Chip in $3.75** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=b92e9ebdac2744ca8a0bcd221d6312f9&_e=96LJYfMZuSIHJG0Xw1L6H61Hi0My2lZxvAioe8HHUIzfg341Qitc0Ycy-vgEzXgzz0RFxTOSlF_GxgOXV25wAyBvYNVePK1WgmKgjqua_KspTGhS89zBr7nYw9G18-nGxxN3DPjGAum9MTeSRlft21etFJkx47k7cJdn3G3xtbn6IQaGrub8EvY3l7NX43M7FDHvIA1SGF7nWAPjLQTtY9fHl37DvhvT4Js2ZFbAoLHgHZdZSreNswQzy4IuHrMBCzFk5TNT0kCxkrMwMS2e-eDkMSozfJuu2FJ1l1WswTUUyn3WhsdqxBffUZLaiYvTaPCYWZk-x_fMiQj3eO5TGy6HsVMBSwxWzcMBCexk4AC1IleSBSZ4kfeUyrTl4U5HnYO2nIGt-XtiUoAMaXs7_8AEA1TPzaCpMJxjjetV4Qk%3D) -Pence Fundraising Team | |

Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

name: Trent Bolger
subject: the diversity and hope that keeps the American spirit alive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
We set this important end-of-month goal for a few reasons: | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9a9dca022ee048869f9c0aba511aae82&_e=MBQrYPsDqvHhvOmZZL2IGimxEhnSXvn0bQYZryf3xZdvKqmHX5e9LHK1krcxpP7sqOZ2Avk4q1zw-76Uu8Sq2wlZuxMCDVnb13boTyl7aMSV1jg7wIVMUG2uSLNiSYee4CIQiF_7fFq0dUmJjIoycHXZdmG8EdK-ZzkfutaDaT3dY4yTME0_CDev3uV7JgaN22llGFkLMcQKW52tVlyBw0uId6rNqZ8XQmquCMwpA5L4pM3i_-v_owOr5q2JESKGdCX57B_im_Nyr6O4vCKlHNiS6tzUCKcvhb_AyK9Wat5pEy0gEnkU62EauL_nTc6K8PlmQXWB5h9sQ-_cRTPUTgK8Zqyrseb-YPxIEX4FT-jkg4smcy3zgRQBwo59d7yQSCbqxlzhsD9KoBfRnqzfoGDidNDU53vtuXQ8z1OA6NN5u90YD-1JrnoFQRPwJorK1V3ee6Fhols4HD2NsnmXJ-FZUZ-6Ww4aKP8368xQHjE%3D)

[](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9a9dca022ee048869f9c0aba511aae82&_e=MBQrYPsDqvHhvOmZZL2IGimxEhnSXvn0bQYZryf3xZdvKqmHX5e9LHK1krcxpP7sqOZ2Avk4q1zw-76Uu8Sq2wlZuxMCDVnb13boTyl7aMSV1jg7wIVMUG2uSLNiSYee4CIQiF_7fFq0dUmJjIoycHXZdmG8EdK-ZzkfutaDaT3dY4yTME0_CDev3uV7JgaN22llGFkLMcQKW52tVlyBw0uId6rNqZ8XQmquCMwpA5L4pM3i_-v_owOr5q2JESKGdCX57B_im_Nyr6O4vCKlHP1knaNdVGtzm8P0G0THO0kapU8ByI9X25OUfAv4suwiJI1gprnsp7nqfESFahKtO4PjPbHAtkg2GEEmnUUftU05BKgLO86y3dSHKLbB7TKQJo9UXUIrx96AFMuzwVnmYsaXxvRvMG3Z-MBlMa0XmGTUp6GStRKDbYcpX56QitQpt2Zc9RgW5NaSzxPPGYyNgRfZZnH5K7Xlc1uG8H5tUYs%3D) We set this important end-of-month goal for a few reasons: **FIRST** , we’ve seen just how corrupt this obstructionist, Republican Senate is, and we know we need to flip it blue. **ALSO** , we’re preparing for a primary battle to ensure Wilmot has the chance to take on Senator Daines head-on because we know he gives us the best chance to beat him. **FINALLY** , we know that electing Wilmot, a Liberian refugee, is one of the best ways to reject Trumpism and its xenophobia and fear-mongering. body:
| | | |
---
---
Before you log off for the night, let me just say this: Even though you saw a lot of spirited back and forth on the debate stage tonight, the reality is, every candidate agrees on the set of problems we desperately need to fix in this country. We all agree that our health care system isn’t working for the vast majority of people, that corporations have a dangerous amount of sway in Washington, that we need to act now to save our dying planet, and that we must defeat Donald Trump in November. That’s common ground for all of us. **But I disagree with many of the solutions that the other candidates are putting forward to solve these problems.** The solution isn’t to put the government in charge of large parts of our economy. The solution isn’t to force people to give up a union-negotiated health care plan that works for them, as Senator Sanders and Senator Warren propose. Unchecked capitalism has failed, but we still need a competitive, dynamic private sector — one that’s regulated with fair and just parameters — to actualize a government that’s truly of, by, and for the people. And here’s one other thing I want to tell you: I am absolutely committed to fighting for the values I talked about on stage tonight. [_**My heart is in these issues, and if yours is too, volunteer to reach out to potential voters in South Carolina before their primary on Saturday.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P3VLzgqSYvfxS4DDLRtITzBI2zIYw-2BYVOMuwituS1JWqC2qMR0s4TMoqdzvCXpPGs908GYxSrH8IzdOrsphNOYv9d5R4xt5OdVTP6iQWEAPNExHGLpmHoPoE39edo-2BDMXzBlmNIU-2B2by1TEUcGXfqWUCd6or0fA4b0IU49A26FFNLRZCVDtO9j0emN-2BBw-2BGjWw-3DW0Xu_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjl4gIclaYtJbufimVIRBDNvK8HU03xUgW0NhkSEhAU84K-2ByBrP4G-2Big5L1tMaaDmwYsvXY5MjlGhfQh0D9ppVbAYuPKlHO-2FQT13p6xOlwdDzLRvFa6d9my05CWMrRWf5LOxyaYopLlVicTog-2FaQriEupcMibAN-2F1R3Q4hpUw0A9YItehnb0TUrL9mA9EAKirzD5IwJGwljpUpAvepJ0AK9pjsYxSz9H6zDJvgTP5xLHE9kEPc9izD1s9OVPXGJmOXoiwRcHt28rC5hqnpbNVKBSiRodcNk0b5k7QIWmDvown4MA2waDoy4hhOJ7hOHzCaKZRHfvm8RGQ7HaWQbMFtayCrG30XNYvoIofEyjdfLrNSjD2w3zkMwF5bGvQDvvW-2Buz-2FWkhOYVGfVp71wV4b2v1DMa5Kbu9yRhyLRXL9Bju220ogBfZXwqFtI9AM9pvYHdsofpn7vp0T0XOxUQGrpyHjRDI03OMJjntaPrpt0PycHDzF0qy4jpsZmjzxg1O-2FKSo4TxFO4bpvqH1KR-2F46bF) Now is not the time to take a step back. The solution isn’t to put the government in charge of large parts of our economy. The solution isn’t to force people to give up a union-negotiated health care plan that works for them, as Senator Sanders and Senator Warren propose. Unchecked capitalism has failed, but we still need a competitive, dynamic private sector — one that’s regulated with fair and just parameters — to actualize a government that’s truly of, by, and for the people. And here’s one other thing I want to tell you: I am absolutely committed to fighting for the values I talked about on stage tonight. Now is not the time to take a step back. Let’s show the rest of the country that we’re bringing change all the way to the White House. — Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you want to be a delegate for Tom at the DNC convention in Milwaukee this July, . To update your contact information, . If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking == — we’ll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()

Friend, I've written to you before about the dangers of Bernie Sanders and his socialist agenda. But how far is he willing to go in his love for a failed ideology? Not only are his comments shocking, but they serve as a massive insult to the millions who have suffered under communist control around the world, including many in our very own country who fled places like Cuba. **This is the best the Democrats have: a lover of communism who defends Fidel Castro, and attacks our American values.** Friend, I am concerned about the direction our country is going in, which is why I am fighting back. name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Supports President Trump in the TN Primary
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-jr/)
# February 25, 2020
## **There is still time to vote in the Tennessee Presidential Preference Primary!**
#TeamHagerty supports President Donald Trump because he is fighting for the American people and will protect the conservative values held by Tennesseans across the state. Make sure you get out to the polls and cast your ballot today before 7:00 p.m., or you'll have to wait until Super Tuesday on March 3rd.
## **Socialist Sanders Surges in Polls**
[](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-r/) If you are wondering whether or not this election matters, remember that Bernie Sanders is the front runner for the Democratic Party. Since the 1980s, Bernie has fought for socialist policies, and just this week, he defended Cuba's Communist regime. This support for communist, authoritarian regimes should trouble all Americans-- Democratic and Republican. Bill Hagerty will fight against the intrusion of socialism in America and will support President Donald Trump in his work to Keep America Great.
## **#TeamHagerty In The News**
[**Richard Floyd:** Bill Hagerty Will Stand With President Trump To Defend Our Unborn Children](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-y/)
I am supporting Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate. As a Christian and a father of four, Bill understands how important it is to stand for life. Bill grew up with Tennessee values, and like so many of us, he truly values the sanctity of life. Bill always says, "abortion is not a human right; it takes a human life," and he is exactly right. Bill will uphold his values and support legislation to strengthen protections for unborn children. He will also push to provide more options for mothers to turn to, such as crisis pregnancy centers, community groups, and faith outreach groups. **[S](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-j/)**[**andy Still**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-t/)[**:** ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-i/)[Hagerty will support religious freedom](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-d/)
Bill Hagerty knows the attack on our religious freedoms is reprehensible and cannot be tolerated. He was raised with Christian conservative values and instilled those values on his four children. Bill, who is endorsed by President Trump, is running for the United States Senate in Tennessee to protect our religious freedoms.[**Michael Tedder: **](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-h/)[In support of Hagerty's U.S. Senate bid](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-k/)
If you think our health care system is broken now, just wait until the federal government takes over. And their Medicare-for-All plan is going to cost at least $32 trillion dollars, which would more than double our national debt. I believe this will destroy our country as we know it. Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state.
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-m/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-c/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-q/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Trump Reinforcement on the Way from Tennessee: Bill Hagerty's Senate Race Highlights President's Takeover of GOP**[Brentwood HomePage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley endorses Bill Hagerty at Nashville fundraiser**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-z/) **Nikki Haley Says Bill Hagerty Is 'A Quality Republican' During Nashville Stop**[WLLX:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-v/) **US Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty to Speak in Lawrenceburg
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-g/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-w/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-yd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-yh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215

[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-ndrihdk-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-ji) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ndrihdk-fuutjhhtj-jd/)

We’re still $9 , 045 away from February’s fundraising goal. We’ve got until Saturday to meet it, will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2]
Bill Lee decided not to offer paid family leave to 38,000 state employees and signed an adoption bill allowing discrimination against LGBQT+ families. GOP leadership is failing us so badly right now it’s hard to watch. That’s why it’s so important that we elevate and elect Democrats in Tennessee. That’s why I’m asking you to donate to the TNDP right now.

FIRST : Democracy for America, a progressive grassroots organization with over 1 million members nationwide, endorsed our campaign for United States Senate. SECOND : A University of Georgia poll found my Republican opponent’s approval rating below 50 percent — meaning a majority of voters are up for grabs. NOW : We have the momentum to win. Our competition is vulnerable. Your contributions have never been more important than right now. Can you make a donation today to help build the grassroots organization we need to win? | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = You are the reason we’re going to win. body:
The best part of running in a non-partisan race is cultivating relationships on both sides of the political aisle. Last week Justice Hutchison had the opportunity to meet with | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15441545/162995934/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZThlMjUwNy1iYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2IMHlnXKOg8rRpRMUlXur4si2l8wgL2d20o5bUDuSc=&emci=b8a7cc7d-b158-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=ce8e2507-ba58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=4846285) |

The best part of running in a non-partisan race is cultivating relationships on both sides of the political aisle. Last week Justice Hutchison had the opportunity to meet with Democrats in Harrison County. A few weeks prior he was in Fayette County meeting with Republicans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15441546/162995935/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZThlMjUwNy1iYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2IMHlnXKOg8rRpRMUlXur4si2l8wgL2d20o5bUDuSc=&emci=b8a7cc7d-b158-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=ce8e2507-ba58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=4846285) "As I travel the state I find people from all walks of life and political stripes who are working to better the Mountain State," Hutchison said recently in a conversation with supporters. "It is inspiring to see people passionately pursuing the ideas they believe in." John is running to serve every citizen of West Virginia. We deserve a Justice that is prepared each day to make decisions fairly and impartially based upon the laws of our state. Justice Hutchison has 24 years of experience serving in the West Virginia Judiciary. Experience is one aspect of life that can only be earned through time and hard work. John has put in the time and he has a tremendous work ethic. Experience Matters. Will you donate today and Keep Justice Hutchison on the Supreme Court? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15441547/162995936/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZThlMjUwNy1iYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2IMHlnXKOg8rRpRMUlXur4si2l8wgL2d20o5bUDuSc=&emci=b8a7cc7d-b158-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=ce8e2507-ba58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=4846285) |

| Friends, We are just a few days away from the end of February and my campaign is **just $5,575 away from our monthly fundraising goal!** Since announcing my campaign to unseat Chris Pappas, Team Mayberry has grown by leaps and bounds every single day. Momentum is clearly on our side - but I need your help! [Please considering making a small donation of $25, $50 or even $100 to my campaign by clicking here so that we can reach our February goal!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY0NDI0MDU2MDM1NjExOTg4JmM9ZTJtNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjI4MTM1OTImZD13OXEwbTlx.9iom9bKMHUAu1iwvSGxbCFTD2y2J4UvjparHqgyG6ck) My opponent is raising huge amounts of money from **Washington D.C. lobbyists and other creatures from the swamp**. My donors are local New Hampshire residents that are looking for a conservative Republican voice to represent them in Congress. We are nearly there - will you be the person that gets us to our goal? Thank you for your help! - Matt

| Peter,
There's less than a week until Election Day! Early Voting is almost complete, but we've still got a lot that needs to be done between now and March 3rd. Below, we have several opportunities for you to get involved and help us cross the finish line. I hope to see you at one (or more) of these volunteer events!
---
| VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES
---
| Early Voting poll greeting \- We are recruiting people to stand and greet voters at the polls from now until the close of early voting on Friday - please [sign up here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CtZtKzOaTrIKCqXQ6B-uE-YXHxP9_Hg8KILiQJKuwh3iLlo35W9mDRHtSjiSQC7ENriHkghtFd02rGSTQB1x-LlZkCRLB-KBc1K0eE64Db-gkvunKy-NxVThxayVsZGZhudwa0-7UitMVaDBiXUXHJgipEvRYj5N&c=Yyybl1SB0b6S7F30KqbRH7y7jr3xoomTBVXt68va5lXaHhg9khQTPQ==&ch=3UuhroooBaX4witMFKubhxuL1diFZ6tSKLfKKXt5tAoDo_4yO4JoRw==).
Weekend block walking \- Meet at our campaign headquarters at 10:30AM on Saturday and 12:00PM on Sunday to help us get out the vote.
Election Day volunteering - We will be doing both poll greeting and phone banking. Opportunities are available all day.

For more information or to RSVP to any of these events, please email [andrew@gcforcongress.com](mailto:andrew@gcforcongress.com)
---
| |
---
| JOIN US ON ELECTION NIGHT
---
| Join Team Genevieve for a night of celebration at our campaign headquarters on Election Night to follow returns as they come in and cheer Genevieve Collins to victory! The party begins at 7:30pm - refreshments will be served.
You can RSVP on Facebook by clicking the image below, or by emailing [andrew@gcforcongress.com](mailto:andrew@gcforcongress.com).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CtZtKzOaTrIKCqXQ6B-uE-YXHxP9_Hg8KILiQJKuwh3iLlo35W9mDRHtSjiSQC7E25tQb3eJJjTrxDQKSWroHDYSCMVUL3jKqT-cErssAZcWbSJZtHMDYcmOjiNtJlEEme8NsZqFWGbFPp-tMN_OJxzOU9okbDUI9Rarcxcd74BRQmeRAGqgvw==&c=Yyybl1SB0b6S7F30KqbRH7y7jr3xoomTBVXt68va5lXaHhg9khQTPQ==&ch=3UuhroooBaX4witMFKubhxuL1diFZ6tSKLfKKXt5tAoDo_4yO4JoRw==)
---
| If you haven't voted yet, you can find Early Voting and Election Day locations and times by [clicking here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CtZtKzOaTrIKCqXQ6B-uE-YXHxP9_Hg8KILiQJKuwh3iLlo35W9mDYSQvQsbh8zcdh-stnIgnA3Lk0wZtitI51ciFFkNkffrwrL0jIDQvAHkKKLlUu8M8xi6qdiKCeveysVDSyjQNx8x9ZAkzlV5CdR8Q_mWAdnB&c=Yyybl1SB0b6S7F30KqbRH7y7jr3xoomTBVXt68va5lXaHhg9khQTPQ==&ch=3UuhroooBaX4witMFKubhxuL1diFZ6tSKLfKKXt5tAoDo_4yO4JoRw==). If you've already voted, I greatly appreciate your support. I know that with our amazing team of supporters, we will be victorious on March 3rd!

subject: We don’t have the same luxuries our opponent does
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15442802/163008005/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA2YmJhMS1iZDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jG2WLcUTMdWGt9aoQGoUhzF_B8e672Cm36owJVOjfw=&emci=2f9786d9-ae58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=1c06bba1-bd58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Team -- Most of you know that Vern Buchanan is one of the wealthiest members of Congress. And, it’s true, we don’t have the same luxuries as he does -- he can write his campaign checks when things look tight (he “loaned” his campaign $100k in January to shore up his lackluster fundraising). But, we have something so much better -- Each. One. Of. You. Every time you make a contribution, it makes a real difference to our campaign. Because for us, every dollar counts--and every deadline matters. So, as February winds down, we’re working hard to meet our goal before the end-of-month deadline. But, before I ask you to [make a contribution to our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15442803/163008006/1079502310?recurring=auto&refcode=E1454-20200226-EOM1-SL&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA2YmJhMS1iZDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jG2WLcUTMdWGt9aoQGoUhzF_B8e672Cm36owJVOjfw=), I want to explain why grassroots fundraising deadlines mean so much to us. Without grassroots support, we will continue to have a Congressman who: ❌ Votes Against the Equal Rights Amendment
❌ Votes Against Lowering Prescription Drug Costs
❌ Votes Against Protecting America’s Wilderness We will win this race because we all stand together to fight for our values--and in this race, every single fundraising deadline is an opportunity to grow our support and show the number of people ready for change. [**Florida deserves a leader who puts regular people first; who values equal rights and the environment, and who works to lower healthcare costs. Help us meet our February goal by making a donation today. We need to hit our $10,000 Online Fundraising goal before the end of the month. Contribute right now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15442804/163008007/1079502310?recurring=auto&refcode=E1454-20200226-EOM1-SL&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA2YmJhMS1iZDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jG2WLcUTMdWGt9aoQGoUhzF_B8e672Cm36owJVOjfw=) | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15442805/163008008/1079502310?refcode=E1454-20200226-EOM1-EG&amount=5&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA2YmJhMS1iZDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jG2WLcUTMdWGt9aoQGoUhzF_B8e672Cm36owJVOjfw=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15442806/163008009/1079502310?refcode=E1454-20200226-EOM1-EG&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA2YmJhMS1iZDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jG2WLcUTMdWGt9aoQGoUhzF_B8e672Cm36owJVOjfw=)

clean_body: Team -- Most of you know that Vern Buchanan is one of the wealthiest members of Congress. And, it’s true, we don’t have the same luxuries as he does -- he can write his campaign checks when things look tight (he “loaned” his campaign $100k in January to shore up his lackluster fundraising). But, we have something so much better -- Each. One. Of. You. Every time you make a contribution, it makes a real difference to our campaign. Because for us, every dollar counts--and every deadline matters. So, as February winds down, we’re working hard to meet our goal before the end-of-month deadline. But, before I ask you to =, I want to explain why grassroots fundraising deadlines mean so much to us. Without grassroots support, we will continue to have a Congressman who: ❌ Votes Against the Equal Rights Amendment ❌ Votes Against Lowering Prescription Drug Costs ❌ Votes Against Protecting America’s Wilderness We will win this race because we all stand together to fight for our values--and in this race, every single fundraising deadline is an opportunity to grow our support and show the number of people ready for change. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, \-- Margaret = | To be removed from this email list, please . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Are you ready?
body:
Let's make history and elect Marc Flores as the first Latino to represent Texas's 18th Congressional District.

http://www.marcfloresforcongress.com?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6a520f2514-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6a520f2514-32267927

Good Morning Peter,

Early voting has already started and the deadline to cast your vote is March 3rd.

Help me become the first Latino to represent our district. Our community needs strong leadership and fair representation.

We need to address flooding, implement a comprehensive reformation on immigration, and put more funding into our schools. Vote for me and use your voice to build a better future for our district, we can do better.

When Do I Vote?

Early voting has already begun so cast your vote today!
The deadline is March 3rd.
Why Should I Vote For You?
I know the issues our community faces and have a plan of action.

Read about it here (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6a520f2514-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6a520f2514-32267927)

Where Can I Vote?

| | I need a moment of your time.

Our campaign has accomplished a lot in the first two months of 2020 and we are receiving incredible support. I’ve earned the [endorsement of President Trump](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=106A129A1A1633), the Staten Island Republican Party, the Brooklyn Republican Party, the Richmond and Kings County Conservative Party, and NYC Minority Leader Councilman Steve Matteo.

As February comes to an end, we have an important deadline on Saturday, February 29th, at midnight. President Trump would like to see our end of the month fundraising report and I want to show off the proud support and strength from supporters like you.

Our end of the month fundraising goals are short just [$9,600](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=106A129A1A1613) and [210](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=106A129A1A1613) individual donors. This morning, he's jumping on the phones at Bloomberg 2020 HQ to hear directly from people who care about our country -- and he wants to hear from you. Today, you can give us a call and tell Mike what you think. [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=52ec07b8edd74b9f9773484aa810f620&_e=Q7eNrmNKx7MnkKTIndOzRjes7fw95z2cCiTjr83rAqbr4Kll1jcS0wbbDvbp_H8vy14l8zTB8Eub6mxR19-FBQ83frUEw4GJfZlI__-mPQSBUImsF_4vUYV-q7OKLEGuOcEOV0EnburJwzKy5u7Rfjzy9xiuPSlBEnhdHX8Y1FRopKP_ER0LPc-gHTZnQ6XJ38egKWoZ3GoXCgXjrNSWDX9-zWkjkQoTg-7fLVr701_iZ8jTqQvHPUR-daG2vfA9ELoDN44qxypiUHGubG6hvC7VF7_kZhvBxhRMMkuzU_g7sBilSQuoDYQoGS8PDqdrx-LbUSh5SpPu61g39fFf-BTVLinBT3Hc4f24FcGr1l0%3D) Here's how it works:
* [**Call 850-679-6453**](tel:18506796453)

name: Adam, Scholten4Iowa
subject: While others are leaving Iowa, J.D. is staying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

To be honest, February is a tough fundraising month for most campaigns. It’s winter, and folks are hunkered down from the snow. What’s especially tough for us is that now that the Iowa Caucuses are over, a lot of the attention on our race has gone away.

While the presidential candidates were in Iowa, they sought out J.D.’s support and advice on how to earn the trust of Iowans. They stumped with him, called him for guidance, and dropped his name at events. And the press covered it every step of the way.

Now, the attention has moved away from Iowa -- but our focus is still on our district and how we can deliver positive, real results for Iowans.

**[Can you help our campaign stay strong? We need to raise $12,000 by the end of the month -- chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15445871/163037110/-856775837?refcode=em20_200226_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmNjQzNC1jYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_bd6uhSCr6xXUWNIcvzQNwh8AmAI8RtITQYhNTNXW0=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15445872/163037111/-856775837?refcode=em20_200226_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmNjQzNC1jYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_bd6uhSCr6xXUWNIcvzQNwh8AmAI8RtITQYhNTNXW0=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15445873/163037112/-856775837?refcode=em20_200226_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmNjQzNC1jYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_bd6uhSCr6xXUWNIcvzQNwh8AmAI8RtITQYhNTNXW0=)

J.D.’s heart is in Iowa. He left the state to play baseball, but when his Grandma Fern told him to come home and take care of the farm, he knew she was right.

He’s in this fight because this is home. His family, friends, and neighbors are facing grocery store closures. A changing climate is affecting our land, water, and profits. Hospitals are offering fewer services. There's a lack of affordable child care -- and so much more.

Rural communities are suffering right now, Peter, so it’s time to do something about it.

Electing J.D. will mean electing a lifelong Iowan with strong values and a deep desire to build a positive future for Iowans.

**[Help us bring it home -- pitch in before the end of the month to help us meet our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15445878/163037117/-856775837?refcode=em20_200226_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmNjQzNC1jYTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_bd6uhSCr6xXUWNIcvzQNwh8AmAI8RtITQYhNTNXW0=)**

Thanks for joining us in this fight -- we need you.

\-- Adam Schantz
Campaign Manager

clean_body: Peter, To be honest, February is a tough fundraising month for most campaigns. It’s winter, and folks are hunkered down from the snow. What’s especially tough for us is that now that the Iowa Caucuses are over, a lot of the attention on our race has gone away. While the presidential candidates were in Iowa, they sought out J.D.’s support and advice on how to earn the trust of Iowans. They stumped with him, called him for guidance, and dropped his name at events. And the press covered it every step of the way. Now, the attention has moved away from Iowa -- but our focus is still on our district and how we can deliver positive, real results for Iowans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = J.D.’s heart is in Iowa. He left the state to play baseball, but when his Grandma Fern told him to come home and take care of the farm, he knew she was right. He’s in this fight because this is home. His family, friends, and neighbors are facing grocery store closures. A changing climate is affecting our land, water, and profits. Hospitals are offering fewer services. There's a lack of affordable child care -- and so much more. Rural communities are suffering right now, Peter, so it’s time to do something about it. Electing J.D. will mean electing a lifelong Iowan with strong values and a deep desire to build a positive future for Iowans. = Thanks for joining us in this fight -- we need you. \-- Adam Schantz Campaign Manager =

name: Tim Kaine
subject: What I want for my birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
There's one thing I really want: to keep working with my good friend Mark Warner in the Senate.
|
---
| | Derek,

**Today 's my birthday.** I've never been one to call attention to it or expect gifts, but I'm making an exception this year. There's one thing I really want: to keep working with my good friend Mark Warner in the Senate.

**[Will you celebrate my birthday with a donation to Mark's re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5fa/53d9897e/530dabf0/1c898111/2800326074/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepmark?refcode=20200226_f_1_nd__487__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Mark and I have been working hard in the Senate for **every Virginian.** Together we've fought for benefits for our veterans, advocated for affordable housing, and worked to ensure that every Virginian has access to affordable health care.

**If Mark isn 't re-elected in November, it would be an enormous setback for Virginia.** Republicans are making a serious play for our state. The Trump Victory Initiative is holding events across the Commonwealth, and a poll of battleground states showed possible scenarios where Donald Trump flips Virginia red.

**Derek, I 'm asking for just one birthday gift this year: [my friend Mark's re-election.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5fa/53d9897e/530dabf0/1c898110/2800326074/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday Feb 29 & Sunday March 1
body:
Greetings Friends and Supporters !

We have another "Weekend of Action" planned for this weekend. Lots of doors to hit all over the district. If you can make it out to **_1 of our 4 walks_** we have organized, please let us know! We also will have Sign Crews going all over the district putting up Large and small signs. If you have a good location for us, please let us know by replying to this email.

Latest News from Jim2020.com
## JIM OBERWEIS ACHIEVES YOUNG GUNS ‘CONTENDER’ STATUS
<https://jim2020.com/jim-oberweis-achieves-young-guns-contender-status/>

## DUPAGE CONSERVATIVES ENDORSE JIM OBERWEIS FOR CONGRESS
<https://jim2020.com/dupage-conservatives-endorse-jim-oberweis-for-congress/>

Vote by Mail Information

<https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/>

Saturday February 29th : 12:30 pm to 4pm.
Walk#1)
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Walk #2)
We will be gathering at Starbucks in Lake Co. ( 1500 Nations Dr Gurnee, IL 60031 ) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress. Grassroots Coordinator Matt Duray will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks and go out walking with the group.

Sunday March 1st : 1:00 pm to 4pm.

Walk #3:
We will be gathering at the Crystal Lake Campaign office ( 6500 Northwest Highway suite 8, Crystal Lake, IL / McHenry Co GOP Office ) at 1:00 pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress. Mchenry Co Field Coordinator Robert Gibbons will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks, and go out walking with the group.

Walk #4:

We will be gathering at Starbucks (1500 Nations Dr Gurnee, IL 60031) at 1:00pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress. Grassroots Coordinator Matt Duray will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks and go out walking with the group.

Let us know if you can make it !

Early voting has started, get out and vote today!

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS

name: Charles Booker
subject: Flip the White House. Flip the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
No matter which Democrat we send to the White House, we have to beat Mitch McConnell.
#
Did you watch the debate last night?
I did. But, the entire time, I kept coming back to the same thought: no matter which of those candidates wins the nomination -- and, fingers crossed, the White House -- they’re going to need a Democratic Senate if they’re going to get anything done.
I mean, we all know that if Mitch McConnell remains in charge of the Senate, he’s going to block **anything and everything** our next Democratic president proposes.
That’s why I’m running to beat Mitch McConnell -- so we can finally have a functional Senate that gets things done for the American people. But Mitch has a big war chest, and some deep-pocketed donors; the only way we’ll beat him is if we build an authentic grassroots movement. [**You can do your part to help build that movement by making a gift to this campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15447979/163057416/957603292?refcode=em20200226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRjY2VlNS1kMDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DKIAeBV7F4nHkBMC8T9wVo7xjR3XLPXoLuTXMQ-06js=)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15447992/163057429/957603292?refcode=em20200226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRjY2VlNS1kMDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DKIAeBV7F4nHkBMC8T9wVo7xjR3XLPXoLuTXMQ-06js=)**
Remember, Mitch McConnell called _himself_ the “grim reaper” of progresive policies -- and, so far, he’s sent nearly 400 bills passed by the Democratic House into his legislative graveyard.
We can’t let that happen under our next president. Look, you can be for Bernie or Biden or Buttigieg, for Warren or Bloomberg or Klobuchar or Steyer but, at the end of the day, no matter what candidate wins, if Mitch McConnell is running the Senate, **all of us are going to lose**.
Thankfully, we _can_ beat McConnell. We _can_ replace him with someone better -- someone who will _support_ progressive policies, not block them.
[**So if you’re tired of the grim reaper killing off good idea after good idea in the name of partisan politics, help me send him packing by supporting my grassroots campaign today. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15447993/163057430/957603292?refcode=em20200226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRjY2VlNS1kMDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DKIAeBV7F4nHkBMC8T9wVo7xjR3XLPXoLuTXMQ-06js=)
I appreciate you,
Charles Booker

**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15447994/163057431/957603292?refcode=em20200226-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRjY2VlNS1kMDU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DKIAeBV7F4nHkBMC8T9wVo7xjR3XLPXoLuTXMQ-06js=)**

body:
...restrict access to abortion and threaten doctors who perform abortions with criminal penalties...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a0/4bef7a87/6de96a1c/287fa19f/3345968032/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -- Reproductive rights are facing an all-out attack in this country:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a0/4bef7a87/6de96a1c/287fa19e/3345968032/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjYtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200226-1-b")
McConnell is able to do this because Republicans control the Senate -- and they're perfectly willing **to let him deny women health care.**
**But don 't worry -- we won't let them turn back the clock on women's rights. Not without a fight:**
**[Rush a $3 contribution to defeat Susan Collins, flip the Senate, and kick McConnell OUT as Majority Leader.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a0/4bef7a87/6de96a1c/287fa19e/3345968032/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjYtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200226-1-b")**
**********[CHIP IN NOW](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658029a0/4bef7a87/6de96a1c/287fa19e/3345968032/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjYtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200226-1-b")**********
The only way to ensure women's reproductive rights are protected is to take back the Senate. If we let McConnell continue steering this ship, he will continue to chip away at _Roe v. Wade._
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara

body:
President Trump can't do it alone. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a4508110c0c0/calling-all-patriots-12205041?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2141fa8e98&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,
President Trump is doing an incredible job draining the Swamp, but he can't do it alone.

The truth is that Congress, which is run by hardcore partisan Democrats right now, is doing everything it can to keep the deep state and its bureaucrats in power as long as possible. Their hope is that they will beat President Trump in 2020 and get to pretend like the last 4 years never happened.

But you and I both know that President Trump is going to get re-elected. His America-First agenda has been incredible for all Americans and none of the radical Democrats have what it takes to beat him.

The question is whether he will have a House that has his back when it comes to draining the Swamp. That’s where you come in.

We need grassroots conservatives to stand up against Democrat radicalism to help us win back the House in 2020. That fight starts right here in Oklahoma’s 5th district, which according to National Journal is the #1 battleground district in the whole country in 2020.

[**Will you help us beat Kendra Horn and give President Trump a House that will help him drain the Swamp by donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500? **](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=643007ed36&e=795c6d9796)

Every dollar makes a difference when it comes to reaching voters and telling them about Kendra Horn’s radical record in office.

She is a true Nancy Pelosi rubber-stamp and opposed all of our Oklahoma values. We can and will beat her we just need your help.

[**Please consider donating just a few dollars to help us power our campaign. When we win we will drain the Swamp TOGETHER with President Trump.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=46d15990c9&e=795c6d9796)
Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1bac6fd65e&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

subject: In case you missed it

**First:** Mike Pence and Betsy DeVos visited South Central Pennsylvania in an effort to prop up Scott Perry.

**Then:** President Trump stood at the White House and congratulated Scott Perry on advocating for a radical agenda and hurting Pennsylvania families in the process.

**Now:[_We’re facing our end-of-month fundraising deadline in just a few short days, and we’re running $8,000 behind where we need to be._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15451268/163084694/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.26_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY1NDRiOC1kYjU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5XKSlSHHuejgU22aRasP_VJwwkLQ1OIhITOGa6h1Qw=) With Scott Perry, President Trump, and their Washington allies making it clear that Pennsylvania is a top priority, we can’t afford to fall short. **

body:
Jerry Evans would like to meet you this Saturday. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8d92ed0a03f2/youre-invited-meet-jerry-evans?e=9b692867fa)
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservatives!

I'd love you to meet each and every one of you this coming **Saturday** (2/29). This is a free event and I will be talking about my plan for the 14th District.

In addition to answering your questions, I will be discussing the following issues:
[1) Fix Our Broken Healthcare System](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=8c7bc94c45&e=9b692867fa)

[2) Small Business and Middle Class Tax Cuts](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=f296d957d9&e=9b692867fa)

[3) Fix the Immigration Crisis](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=2eb9a111e3&e=9b692867fa)

4) My Commitment to Legislate Pro-Life Issues

Election day is quickly approaching and it would be an honor to meet you this weekend.

Sincerely,

Jerry Evans

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vNdjZ3hyZSa_tsd81RlB3_5mJe79YVVtw7WSep1ofNk=/X41l5xX0_dRZQJaKyvp-L_JnfwR_rDiEnkgKsdDVumU=?refcode=200226-email) This month was a big one in the race for Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. Rita was spending her time traveling from Pella to Danville and beyond, listening to the hard-working people of our communities while also receiving endorsements from organizations and leaders across Iowa and the U.S. **[We're picking up momentum, and it makes sense -- there are only about 8 months left in this race. That's also why I'm emailing, Peter. We need to raise the resources we need for March before February ends. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 3 Big Takeaways from Trump's Successful Trip to India
body:
President Trump just concluded a historic trip to India, returning with some notable accomplishments alongside Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=477c2cbc55&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **3 Big Takeaways from Trump's Successful Trip to India**

President Trump just concluded a historic trip to India, returning with some notable accomplishments alongside Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, James Jay Carafano writes for Fox News.

* “Over 100,000 people packed a cricket stadium to hear Trump and the Indian prime minister reprise the [Howdy Modi] event in Houston, Texas a few months ago.”

* The two leaders sealed a deal to boost our defense partnership. “The U.S. and India have forged something new and unprecedented . . . We know that from the most distant Pacific Island to the Middle East we have each other’s back.”

* Trade deals are coming: “India knows it’s time to change. With now the fifth-largest economy, it is time to harness that economic potential to drive real growth. Nothing will make that happen faster than partnering with the U.S.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0418d38149&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative (W-GDP), spearheaded by Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump, aims to advance women’s economic activity by dismantling regulatory barriers to success. According to a new Council of Economic Advisers report, by fully removing these legal barriers, annual global GDP would grow by $7.7 trillion, Anthony B. Kim writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84ebc981e4&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.dailysignal.com/2020/02/20/ivanka-trumps-global-development-and-prosperity-initiative-empowers-women/").
---
|
---
| CNN caught heat yesterday “for publishing a report that refers euphemistically to a newborn baby as a ‘fetus that was born.’ As it turns out, though, CNN is not even close to being the first newsroom to deploy this nonsensical term to refer to newly born infants. There is a long history of newsrooms deploying this dystopian gobbledygook in service of promoting the pro-choice line,” Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=248fe17c46&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Senate Democrats yesterday blocked legislation that “would require babies who survive abortion to be provided with the same medical care as any newborn of the same age born prematurely.” President Trump has repeatedly called on Congress to end late-term abortions and pass pro-life legislation. Nearly 80 percent of Americans support medical treatment for babies who survive abortion, Dr. Susan Berry writes in [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6ff8f3aec&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ded82f88f5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b52c67375d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4a02cd3560)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: More Mistakes have been made
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8e037aef7b7e/exclusive-new-ad-alert-6368191?e=5ac6ff05c3)
---
| |
---
| | We have highlighted another week of #MassieMistakes. As you can see from our [Facebook](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=801f8f3e39&e=5ac6ff05c3) page, there are more mistakes than we can cover in 100 days and certainly more than enough to justify voting Massie out of office. We are just getting started. If you missed any, here is a recap:

· **Massie opposed protecting law enforcement** , voting against increasing penalties for criminals who plan and carry out ambush attacks against law enforcement officers.

· **Massie opposed protecting children** as one of only two congressmen who voted against the Victims of Child Abuse Reauthorization Act. Efforts to protect those who have gone through a traumatic experience, at such a young age, should be supported.

· **Massie voted NO on giving our military service members a pay raise.**

· While Hong Kong protestors were demanding democracy and freedom, **Massie was the only vote in the House to side with communist China and vote "no."**

· **Massie failed to take a stand against Obama's Iran Nuclear Deal.**
---
| [Follow on Facebook](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=b0cb8a5391&e=5ac6ff05c3 "Follow on Facebook")
---
| How would you have voted on these critical issues?

If you believe abused children should be protected, Obama's Iran Nuclear Deal was a mistake, and our men and women in uniform deserve a raise, please FORWARD THIS EMAIL to 3 friends.

We need your help to spread the word, and we have only a short time left to do it. Thank you.

\- Todd
---

We set a really difficult goal on Monday -- one that would ensure our campaign has the resources we need to fight back against the attacks we are facing from the GOP's dark money network. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Staring at the back of a car . . .
body:
We’ll always find a way! Yes, I’m banned on Facebook, Twitter, and even on Uber, for speaking the truth.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f) We’ll always find a way!

Yes, I’m banned on Facebook, Twitter, and even on Uber, for speaking the truth.

For a candidate for public office to be banned on Facebook is a BIG deal! It’s a highly targeted way to reach voters directly.

Just to show the importance of targeted advertising, President Trump’s campaign has spent $307,000 on Facebook within the LAST WEEK!

But there’s other GREAT ways to campaign, [**and I’d like your help to fund a new round of ads**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f).

If you commute to work, you likely spend the majority of your time staring at the back of a car, and thanks to a creative small business owner, we can now place “Laura Loomer for Congress” ads on the back of vehicles within my Congressional District!

[**Will you help fund one ad for a month?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884514-cc33836aab-ba7c87426f)

The cost per month, per car is $150.

[**A gift of $25 can fund five days of an ad.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884515-c841b7f012-ba7c87426f)
[**$50 funds 10 days on the road.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884516-a5a24374a4-ba7c87426f)
[**$150 funds an entire month!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884514-cc33836aab-ba7c87426f)
Even better, the business owner will be placing the ads only with drivers who are “pro-Trump” and “pro-Loomer” and we’ll give them marketing materials that they can hand over to any voters who are curious!

Take that Facebook!

**Our goal is to put 100 cars on the road and keep them on the road until November!**

But we have to act fast to lock in the very best drivers who will represent our campaign in the best way possible.

[**Will you help put one car on the road?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f)

I met the owner of this small advertising agency recently at a local gun show. He was actually signing one of my petitions and asked how he could help and we came up with this idea!

Not only are we getting a great deal, but WHEN the ads are vandalized or stolen, they’ll be replaced at no cost.

Right now, [**_you can support my campaign and a small, conservative business owner in a way that circumvents the control of Big Tech_**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f). No communist billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg will get A DIME!

This is something YOU can do that makes a direct impact!

On average, 26,000 people will see our ad each month PER CAR! The drivers clock a lot of miles and are making a few extra dollars while they do their jobs making deliveries or even driving for Uber -- and Uber can do nothing to stop us . . . even though I’m personally banned from Uber!

Thank you so much for all that you do, and [**help me put a few cars on the road today!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-4884513-2550f2ff74-ba7c87426f)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-365808-857675-84585d41bbe610b-ba7c87426f)

---

name: Allen Chen
subject: The Countdown Is On (6 Days)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vTUAiHwulXN0RijIAC75LzrQtzZncTZE-YXGBDkDHC4=/1P7Wra96zvZnjQmqnc4NjY9Q4hE5gaM0KcOaQwiZZlM=?refcode=20200226&amount=25&recurring=1)

Team,

We're less than a week out from the primary, and every single hour in these final days counts as March 3rd approaches!

We need to make sure we're giving the primary all we've got to avoid a runoff so we can truly focus our resources on flipping this seat in November.

**[But we still need to raise another $8500 online before the 29th to hit our goal. Would you consider making a contribution of any size, friend, to ensure we have the resources we need to win?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vTUAiHwulXN0RijIAC75LzrQtzZncTZE-YXGBDkDHC4=/1P7Wra96zvZnjQmqnc4NjY9Q4hE5gaM0KcOaQwiZZlM=?refcode=20200226&amount=25&recurring=1)**

We know that Sri's got what it takes to lead, and according to our latest endorsement from the _Houston Chronicle_ , he's got what it takes to win _and_ to flip this seat!

Sri grew up here, he experienced and knows the challenges that our communities are facing today: flooding, gun violence, a broken criminal justice system, and unequal access to education.

And everyone on Team Sri is fighting to make sure that he can use his experience to push for progress for Texans.

**[Team, you may know that Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows we deserve a representative who serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests, so we need your support to win this primary.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vTUAiHwulXN0RijIAC75LzrQtzZncTZE-YXGBDkDHC4=/1P7Wra96zvZnjQmqnc4NjY9Q4hE5gaM0KcOaQwiZZlM=?refcode=20200226&amount=25&recurring=1)**

This campaign will continue to center our communities, work to be more inclusive, and fight for all voters to be heard.

We hope you'll continue to fight with us,

Allen Chen

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today, we released our final ad of the Primary Election. [Check it out!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0e2405c3ea15435b87b841bd25fafab4&_e=E4O9qX8Ol6vcacJ3uNzE1HJn0gZ4Kbs-ohBY9VdG_HN1e8GrXTQn4UaSpRbxtq6Z-K2anEsQQYISFCYDBIYESik-Qn7fQA_x17Tgew7CpGD4T1KERW8bIQDfOdDqXYWmOUZ4dHFPlFF5ihXT2X4fm4eBStlElgs63cBpWS2zpuJFwMZ6r44CURqCMth-BFBW5nDu44HC4wagtIiTyDobDiO1yzqxP6q4phj15-sgVWHQAk3AodnyCbH6ndK7Pk9nN4Lq79boeC-vXtZRm-7h2plqOnxRz19I4TAM_A81iuQ%3D)

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0e2405c3ea15435b87b841bd25fafab4&_e=E4O9qX8Ol6vcacJ3uNzE1HJn0gZ4Kbs-ohBY9VdG_HN1e8GrXTQn4UaSpRbxtq6Z-K2anEsQQYISFCYDBIYESsL2CuAMZMBuyTzVdx-hWdVwWySSqSr6WfMm86BzrsW45-tCmBqeScpd7ikY49KYvaKaXY8NIt2hMXsaaCSi3X-Wyb0MUGoBrcLsvrtA4lzri8sReNvTBjK58PXThavr5a-4NSfUrIP7tFlTHeB4T5BkucKYWzc8vGf_f31ZSdyKrqtLhdKBZ2tihQJtV786N44sHbR8-91zO5M5bTA1nHM%3D)
[Click here to watch the ad](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0e2405c3ea15435b87b841bd25fafab4&_e=E4O9qX8Ol6vcacJ3uNzE1HJn0gZ4Kbs-ohBY9VdG_HN1e8GrXTQn4UaSpRbxtq6Z-K2anEsQQYISFCYDBIYESmpd4OWZ6LNDzijLhqmTg9_XY49HVafYTGN4eRHK0DpvXGaCu17yV1FCd58Uc2ZmOGXOioYGvvTYl23bhVzIQ5T0aRywg-ZcYvVQr_o_HLmtxPQ-tXja6h2L1oVxBBNplOgAZo-qTKNa6hTJyhBbN16FuPU9hts1BJTLx6ScBpo_fLl4cC1P17N75huhDSt-T1jyoMyrY51yPtXiUmKzLvM%3D)

When my great-great-grandfather came to America, he worked the land bound by chains. My family went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations and 2 weeks ago, this great-great-grandson of a slave was endorsed by the President of the United States of America.

From slavery to West Point in five generations, that’s my family's story. That’s also America’s story—taking the country we were given and making it better for future generations. It's the story of overcoming adversity, persevering and prospering. It's the story of working hard to provide a better life for your children.

That's the American Dream. Defending that Dream is the reason that I attended West Point and flew 55 combat missions over Baghdad. It's also the reason that I am running for Congress today. I want to make sure that the American Dream that has allowed my family to prosper, continues to exist for my daughter and for all of our children.

I hope that I'll be able to count on your vote and your continued support.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

**PS: I hope you can join us this evening at Los Cucos in Jersey Village for a free Meet and Greet event!**

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0e2405c3ea15435b87b841bd25fafab4&_e=E4O9qX8Ol6vcacJ3uNzE1JrlcTDZgjfL0Yt5NNFlcL6qY-rrCrOyj6Ouc1gJBF08iOCqtoatBA5dnLh_A6tyXcOXSUxfaA7mPpR4ydDgNyP9ksL6CquTwFjcqRnz1kXdaldeuS_GnyqM1u6BfUQNX0nt-ydsbMy1rcEf4YibmbJcOeKrVen4L1pSWQIo8TXLXHlKH9F_Nbz07ygmsoy8CNklVw5e0RjqC1ijVMEhmzNyzC2Cka0nrKCU3-KkQ6zbOXnrIj72A5Tb2vC1JZkD7wUS-hArLO82KHKAAZVUrRM%3D)****

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: re: where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
I know this election is going to be a tough fight, but with your support, we will be able to keep up the momentum. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1b3d3d5d27244624ad7eba506bcf7703&_e=DK6T_E31wDR7HPTXbk2cn0KWyED9cV9v3QeImMzX2tntYv90HIyS59KpJGfB6l80LOfbl7l-fu6eXfpih-wSweJ2IUMd_DiaZSTj0eSXbDZ-cCyiKLxufKZccFM7Hw--RQQ_7TSIooimsjhe12hGV43q7q60U44uPcN8X3QIHVrgUu47qCMBzeI_I8TVtjtDMvcfXA0199CeTjK7E2OId6A-Hda9sM3AC2DEdimVQR3ZjqrkQJ2JoCt2s5MzmJ0zUsV6ctY7dRQ2KvPTf3qV5b9lGwzrdnJH2Tq-sfLkHmmCoDhA_REag9lPSJjryqJ20owIvrnytA9qQfHaBEe49UZ0NjBYDO6JAqS5NQvfKKl67zbdoldbKbyIgLw3H8oFQw5K-H9UF19AhhYeEgUXs2DnHkVW7bR4BWLSBcQ-Fgs%3D) | |
---
Peter,

To say this has been a busy month would be an understatement. Here’s where things stand:
**FIRST:** Conservatives finally beat the impeachment sham when the Senate voted to find President Trump NOT GUILTY on both articles of impeachment.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed MY campaign for Congress and we've been connecting with voters and sharing our message ever since.

name: Tina Smith
subject: What's coming
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4pVfWxlYcpDLvy6X-5W-6-rkbzPfrol8B9dK_gHFmgs=/IffWLKVeA8_xaQG7dOxl0IcPs_VtxD_66Y5f_NO_cpo=?refcode=022620)
| | Friend, When I was Lieutenant Governor of Minnesota I worked closely with the legislature to bring to life a vision of Minnesota that works better for everyone. After working with a legislature controlled by Republicans, I can't tell you what it means to see Speaker Hortman and the House DFL Majority move the needle on some of the most important issues facing our state. **Now I 've worked with DFLers in the Minnesota House and I've met many of the candidates running and I can tell you this: They know what it takes to put in the work to get the job done for their communities.** I am excited to be on the ballot with them this year. You see, House DFLers are key to our grassroots support and strengthen our entire ticket. That's why I'm coming to you today. **Will you chip in $25 today to help the House DFL not just protect but grow their majority in 2020?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **[Chip in $25->](https://act.myngp.com/el/4pVfWxlYcpDLvy6X-5W-6-rkbzPfrol8B9dK_gHFmgs=/IffWLKVeA8_xaQG7dOxl0IcPs_VtxD_66Y5f_NO_cpo=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=022620)** We know what is coming and we need your help. **Trump came within striking distance of turning Minnesota red and he 's already made Minnesota a top target for 2020.** From common-sense gun violence prevention to affordable and accessible health care to solidifying the protection of reproductive rights, there is so much on the line this year. With so much at stake, we need the House DFL Majority now more than ever. Thank you, Senator Tina Smith [**_P.S. You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) each year and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. Act now._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4pVfWxlYcpDLvy6X-5W-6-rkbzPfrol8B9dK_gHFmgs=/C-UtwgrN4-wkL1ZKJT2qGg-wxnL7Ku2HYSZmocQXAaE=?refcode=022620) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4pVfWxlYcpDLvy6X-5W-6-rkbzPfrol8B9dK_gHFmgs=/IffWLKVeA8_xaQG7dOxl0IcPs_VtxD_66Y5f_NO_cpo=?refcode=022620)

| | Despite what pundits say, _no one _can predict who will win the Presidency in 2020. It is going to be a long road ahead for the Democrats to win back the White House, but one thing is crystal clear: _no matter who wins we can't lose the House!_ [**Will you help Christy defend this seat by chipping in today?**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb6/689472506/VEsE/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022620_House_a&amount=25&recurring=auto") If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **[Express Donate: $3](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb7/689472506/VEsF/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=express_lane_3")** **[Express Donate: $15](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb0/689472506/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15")** **[Express Donate: $75](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb1/689472506/VEsD/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75")** **[Express Donate: $150](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb2/689472506/VEsA/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150")** **[Or, donate another amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8fb3/689472506/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other")** During the first two years of Trump's time in office, the GOP controlled the House. Instead, they passed a Tax Scam that benefits Billionaires and big corporations, and repeatedly tried to take away our healthcare. **Christy will make sure that no matter who occupies the White House, the People's Agenda will be put first. ** **[Donate today to make sure we win the House in 2020](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8f8c/689472506/VEsO/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022620_House_a&amount=25&recurring=auto").** Let's do this! _Team Christy _ [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b85d/29776869/aab8f1b/569f8f8c/689472506/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022620_House_a&amount=25&recurring=auto") |
