name: Team Kennedy
subject: forward progress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb61/3518296728/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | There is a lot going on in the world of politics at this moment, and it's often hard to keep up - but we wanted to let you know what we were able to accomplish this month because of your support:
* **Joe won the first Primary Debate:** In the first debate of this Senate primary, Joe showed on live TV that he is, without a doubt, the best person in this race to represent Massachusetts in the Senate.
* **We held our first-ever Kennedy Regional Organizing Convention:** We had over 400 volunteers show up on a frigid Sunday to learn more about organizing and how our grassroots movement works.
* **Our team has brought in hundreds of new faces, overperforming in our State Democratic Caucuses this month:** Weekend after weekend we have been bringing more people into the political process, infiltrating what has long been an insiders game of choosing Delegates for the MA Democratic Convention. We are bringing in new faces, voices, and doing it in force.
* **We're building a growing coalition - every age, color, creed, ideology and identity is represented: **Joe continues to earn the support of a rising generation of diverse leaders across the state and has received endorsements from 25 labor unions, the most in this race so far.
* **Joe just keeps showing up:** From grabbing pizza in Western Mass to visiting local businesses in Chelsea, Joe is sticking to the core promise of our campaign - showing up, for everyone.

[**It's clear we have momentum. Help us keep it up. Pitch in what you can before the end of the month so we can sustain this pace and win our primary:**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb62/3518296728/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-26-eom&recurring=1&amount=3") _If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb63/3518296728/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-02-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb6c/3518296728/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-02-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---

[$100](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb6f/3518296728/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabWwyWlgxOSI6IjEwMCJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=2020-02-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [Other](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639038f/55b66746/22b86cd1/80fcb68/3518296728/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-26-eom&recurring=1")
Let's finish this month strong,
\- Team Kennedy

name: Team Tina
subject: Do you have time for three quick things?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200226-eom10?refcode=em200226-eom10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Here are three important things you need to know about our race in Minnesota:

1\. **Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the Republican National Committee have millions of dollars on hand to meddle in key Senate races** -- and you can bet dollars to doughnuts they'll be using their pots of money to meddle in ours.

2\. **Mike Pence is coming back to Minnesota to fire up Trump's right-wing base and prop up our opponent.** It's a sure sign of trouble -- especially after Trump recently dumped heaps of resources into our state.

3\. **Donald Trump Jr. is hosting a high-dollar fundraiser for our opponent TOMORROW.** Republicans are sending in the cavalry to defeat Tina because they know they'll need to win here to hold the Senate majority.

It's no coincidence all of these things are happening at once. Democrats will have virtually no chance to flip the Senate without Minnesota. That's why Republicans are throwing everything but the kitchen sink at us!

But if we continue to work hard, hit our goals, and keep Minnesota blue, there's a very real chance we'll take back the Senate this year. So, we're asking:

**Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to help us send a resounding message to Trump, Pence, and the rest of the GOP that our campaign is ready to take them on and win? He 's also being personally helped to the tune of millions of dollars by radical rightwing billionaire Charles Koch. I'm refusing all corporate PAC money, because I won't be bought. But the truth is, that puts me at a disadvantage compared to Chabot 's millions in dark money. "" | | "" Together, we can take back this seat from moneyed interests and put working families first. \-- Nikki Foster | | Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district. If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio Nikki Foster for Ohio PO Box 537 Mason, OH 45040 mailto:info@nikkifosteroh.com "" ""

name: Mike Franken
subject: Re. Theresa's Super PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I know you understand the threat of dark money. It is a corrupting influence in our democracy that is left unchecked and unmonitored, and it gives a huge leg up to those who are willing to take it. It
|
---
| |
---

| | Look, friends, I was appalled to see how much corporate PAC money Theresa Greenfield is benefiting from. I know you understand the threat of dark money. It is a corrupting influence in our democracy that is left unchecked and unmonitored, and it gives a huge leg up to those who are willing to take it. It means candidates are "owned" early. That's not me -- I can't be bought. And in this election, I expect my fellow Democrats to follow the same standard. I'm running to put the power of choosing our senators and congresspeople back in the hands of Iowans -- not party bosses, corporations, nor Big Pharma. [**I know you want the same thing. But that means we have to fight harder than corporations and party bosses. We need an army of folks chipping in $5 or $10 at a time. Can you join up?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f0/33365068/4a6c33f9/3f8be7dc/2617366644/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200226_darkmoneykick_em_fr_all_L1") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f0/33365068/4a6c33f9/3f8be7dd/2617366644/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200226_darkmoneykick_em_fr_all_btn1")

Help us end corruption and Washington's interference. Iowans know what's best for them, not D.C.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s aggressive coronavirus response
body:
Under President Trump’s leadership, the full weight of the U.S. Government is working to protect the health and safety of the American people. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed554fe29a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 26, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s aggressive coronavirus response**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5193ee25a3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| [**Watch L****IVE at 6:30 p.m. ET as President Trump and members of the Coronavirus Task Force hold a news conference.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=36aa17598d&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d")

**Under President Trump’s** leadership, the full weight of the U.S. Government is working to protect the health and safety of the American people.

**Tonight at 6:30 p.m. ET** , the President and members of the Coronavirus Task Force will hold a news conference to update Americans on the federal response to the coronavirus.

**Decisive action** from President Trump at the beginning of the outbreak—including prudent travel restrictions and an early containment strategy—has given local officials time to prepare. Last month, the President formed a Coronavirus Task Force, led by Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar and comprised of subject-matter experts, to organize a whole-of-government response.

**As a result** , America has been able to stay ahead of the outbreak as it develops abroad.

**The Trump Administration** also recently requested new funding authorities from Congress. With this action, the Administration expects to allocate at least $2.5 billion to fight the coronavirus. That funding will go toward public health preparedness, laboratory testing, quarantine costs, the development of vaccines, and other healthcare priorities.

**One principle** in particular has defined President Trump’s approach: radical transparency. Rather than keep Americans in the dark, the Administration wants citizens to be able to see inside each step of the process. The President also wants all Americans to understand how their government is working hard to keep them safe.

**“We’re taking this** incredibly serious here in the United States,” Secretary Azar said. “We are doing the most aggressive containment efforts in modern history to prevent further spread in the United States. We’re going to continue taking those measures.”

[Tune in to President Trump’s briefing LIVE at 6:30 p.m. ET.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80a8e9523c&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ:** [“Our coronavirus response is protecting Americans”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=389cc2e667&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3e5bdc422&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=720ab43c56&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c08fc8cdd1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb41dd/4bd7760e/47b0f3c6/77ac12d7/1689252475/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200226_3MO-3MAT-3MNTL_1MC-1MO_STD_8_eom1_send2&source=314_EM_FR_200226_3MO-3MAT-3MNTL_1MC-1MO_STD_8_eom1_send2")** to make a donation.

Adam Schiff asked ya. Kirsten Gillibrand asked ya. Khizr Khan asked ya. Tom Udall asked ya. Martin Heinrich asked ya. Paul Begala asked ya. Deb Haaland asked ya. Now I'm asking ya again. [_**Every top Democrat under the sun asked because hitting Ben Ray 's end-of-month goal is MAKE OR BREAK to defeat McConnell's Senate! How's about you toss in $10 before the 72-hour deadline to get the job done for Democrats? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200226_em_fr_b2_carville_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Here's the deal: \-- McConnell could lose his seat -- and his whole freaking majority \-- Even _Fox News_ admits Mitch McConnell's approval is TANKING \-- But Democrats' chances are ZERO to defeat McConnell's Senate if we don't win New Mexico If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give Ben Ray our money NOW! He's got a gap to fill and only 72 hours until the end-of-month deadline to do it. Can I count on ya? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200226_em_fr_b2_carville_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b692/18e32a7f/4e2d2e56/7b222e69/478367332/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b692/18e32a7f/4e2d2e56/7b222e6e/478367332/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b692/18e32a7f/4e2d2e56/7b222e6f/478367332/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125
